name: @postoaklabs/ocgr-embed
description: Run AINumbers' verified OpenChainGraph compliance logic inside your own environment, and verify any execution_hash offline against the public OCG standard. Zero telemetry, zero network.
author: Post Oak Labs
_publishing: PRIVATE by deliberate choice. Publishing (npm / public repo) is DEFERRED TO THE HUMAN — flip "private" and confirm the CC BY 4.0 license + the packaged file set first. This build must not be published.
